Beginner (A2) Story Guide Public

A2: Welcome to Ovi English School

Source topic: Episode 00: Welcome to Ovi English School

Quality checked lesson

A warm welcome lesson that explains how students should use the podcast and website together: listen, read, tap words, add flashcards, do quiz, and review again.

Transcript

You can switch anytime.

Current mode

Study mode: full transcript with word help and inline checks.

Hold any word for a moment to open the dictionary. Language switch translates single words only for flashcards.

Read-along works with this web player.
